description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine setdiagresopf_2, and is implemented by a call to setdiagresopf_2. Use this API to specify the OPF annotation options in the active Slider diagram. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.2.0. setdiagresopf(opfbusvoltmag, opfbuspinj, opfbusqinj, opfloadsens, opffxssens, opfswssens)
python_syntax: setdiagresopf(opfbusvoltmag, opfbuspinj, opfbusqinj, opfloadsens, opffxssens, opfswssens)
